title: Simple attack indicator
description: A texture pack that makes the attack indicator simple
body:
this texture pack makes the attack indicator more simple
![A iron sword killing a sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa285d779f47a99f031f5df42a6e796a86f72fc.png)

this was mainly made for [Enhanced Attack Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-attack-indicator) as it makes the attack indicator look more general
